title: Where can I find Tojis tracksuit
display_title: Where can I find Tojis tracksuit
wikitext:
[]: Where can I find Toji's tracksuit?             Quote Post by ElFrijol » Sat Aug 24, 2024 6:53 pm So my friends and I were planning to go as EVA characters this Halloween and I chose to be Toji, but I found out that there are almost no places selling his tracksuits except one eBay listing selling one for 300 hundred dollars. I was wondering if you guys knew some info about it and could possibly help me. Here is the eBay listing https://www.ebay.com/itm/155188177086

[]: Re: Where can I find Toji's tracksuit?             Quote Post by Tim Julius » Mon Aug 26, 2024 10:00 am You could try custom cosplay services on Etsy or modify a similar tracksuit yourself. Also, check AliExpress, Taobao, or cosplay forums for deals and secondhand options.

[]: Re: Where can I find Toji's tracksuit?             Quote Post by deeRez » Thu Oct 24, 2024 4:21 am So that's an official cosplay from the official Evangelion store https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gA8011201/ It seems everything is out of stock except XL, which is more in line with an American L.
